name: @gana-v8/publisher-worker
description: Applies publication policy and fan-out distribution adapters.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @gana-v8/domain-core build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/parlay-engine build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/storage-adapters build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm run build && node --test dist/tests/**/*.test.js && node --input-type=module --eval "import('./dist/src/index.js').then((module) => { if (module.workspaceInfo?.packageName !== '@gana-v8/publisher-worker') throw new Error('workspaceInfo.packageName mismatch'); if (!Array.isArray(module.workspaceInfo?.dependencies)) throw new Error('workspaceInfo.dependencies should be an array'); console.log('test ok: @gana-v8/publisher-worker'); })"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @gana-v8/domain-core build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/parlay-engine build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/storage-adapters build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.clean: node --eval "import('node:fs/promises').then(fs => fs.rm('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
